ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_year" INTEGER /* Year the order was placed */,
  "order_month" INTEGER /* Month the order was placed */,
  "order_day_in_month" INTEGER /* Day of the month the order was placed */,
  "service_level" INTEGER /* Service level of the order (1 being the highest priority) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Exact date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "base_curve" REAL /* Base curve of the contact lens */,
  "power" REAL /* Power of the contact lens */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for low-stock alerts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "ordered_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "reserved_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product reserved */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the report details */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
